testcase.name: test_health_check
testcase.failure: tests/test_erp_api.py:24: in test_health_check assert data.get("status") == "healthy" E AssertionError: assert 'ok' == 'healthy' E E - healthy E + ok

testcase.name: test_root_endpoint
testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:976: in json return complexjson.loads(self.text, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/__init__.py:346: in loads return _default_decoder.decode(s) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:337: in decode obj, end = self.raw_decode(s, idx=_w(s, 0).end()) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/json/decoder.py:355: in raw_decode raise JSONDecodeError("Expecting value", s, err.value) from None E json.decoder.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: tests/test_erp_api.py:41: in test_root_endpoint data = response.json() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:980: in json raise RequestsJSONDecodeError(e.msg, e.doc, e.pos) E requests.exceptions.JSONDecodeError: Expecting value: line 1 column 1 (char 0)

testcase.name: test_get_invoices
testcase.failure: tests/test_erp_api.py:134: in test_get_invoices assert response.status_code in [200, 400, 422] E assert 404 in [200, 400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_f24_list
testcase.failure: tests/test_erp_api.py:164: in test_f24_list assert response.status_code in [200, 404, 422] E assert 403 in [200, 404, 422] E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
